name: Peter Duchin
abstract: Peter Oelrichs Duchin (born July 28, 1937) is an American pianist and band leader.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I know you’ve been playing with both Dick Hyman and with Peter Duchin. ... With Peter Duchin, it’s pretty cut and dry. We do basically the same things wherever we go.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Leggio
about_quotes.evidence: from Peter Duchin on, from all the big bands, from Lester Lanin, they all had to include rock guitar players
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Leggio interviewed by Monk Rowe, Tarrytown, New York, October 31, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Jonah Jones
about_quotes.evidence: we celebrated our anniversary ... we went on the cruise he was on ... Peter Duchin and Cab and his daughter.
